summary: 2 of 14 fresh world events are relevant to Northwind's supplier graph: Gujarat flooding (sole-source emulsifier plant region) and a Gulf Coast tropical storm (packaging-film supplier).

Gujarat flood maps to Vadodara Specialty Chemicals (hybrid match 0.92, plant 6.4 km from the flood centroid); graph traversal reaches 2 finished products through 2 Tier-1 blenders: Trailpoint Granola Bar and Vela Sparkling Botanicals.

Trailpoint Granola Bar is the critical exposure: 9 days of emulsifier cover vs an estimated 21-day disruption — $460,000 of revenue at risk. Vela Sparkling holds 18 days (watch, $95,000 tail). Gulf-storm film exposure fully covered (34 days).
detail: dollars_at_risk = daily_revenue × max(0, est_disruption_days − days_of_cover). Granola: $38.3k/day × 12 days. Severity 0.84 (sole source, no qualified second source onboarded, flood still active).

summary: Operator approved re-sourcing emulsifier supply (appr-20260610-7f3a): draft a contingent PO with the best qualified alternate and confirm availability by call.

Jurong Fine Ingredients selected from 3 qualified alternates (match 0.91; FSSC22000/Halal/Kosher; high capacity; 7-day expedited air). Contingent PO po-2026-0042 drafted: 12,000 kg @ $4.85/kg = $58,200, split air/sea.
Supplier confirmed on call: 3,000 kg by air arriving 2026-06-17 (7 days), 9,000 kg by sea arriving 2026-06-26; price held at $4.85/kg. Commitment remains contingent on PO status.

Coverage gap closed for Trailpoint Granola Bar: confirmed 7-day lead beats 9 days of cover (margin 2 days). Vela Sparkling covered by the sea balance (day 16 < 18 days of cover). Residual risk medium — single qualified alternate until Vadodara restarts.
Situation report rpt-20260610-0001 generated: 1 critical exposure secured ($460,000 at risk averted), 2 watch items, residual risk medium.
